name: python3-httpagentparser
title: python3-httpagentparser
description:
Python HTTP Agent Parser (Python 3)
Extracts OS Browser etc information from http user agent string
.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-httpagentparser because Python HTTP Agent Parser (Python 3).

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-httpagentparser with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-httpagentparser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
